name: Clay Harrison

contactInfo.office: 118 Church St., Suite 400, Sulphur Springs, TX 75482

bio: Clay Harrison serves as the District Attorney for Hopkins County, prosecuting felony criminal cases in the Sulphur Springs area. He is committed to protecting public safety and delivering justice for Hopkins County.
campaignPromises: Address the drug crisis in Hopkins County
Support victims of crime and their families
Run an efficient and transparent DA's office
Strengthen law enforcement partnerships to reduce crime
